Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Historically, he never killed himself due to Cao Pi. He instead died naturally, albeit at a young age.

full_text:
Cao Xiong 曹熊
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Xiong (曹熊)was born in Pei. Fourth son of Cao Cao from Lady Bian. Cao Xiong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.

BiographySource Undefined
Cao Xiong was the fourth son of Cao Cao by Lady Bian. He was born after 192 and died before 220. However, he lived long enough to have a son, Cao Bing.
